reasoning: The primary limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. This workout is designed to enhance these areas by inducing and managing lactate production, helping to mirror key aspects of the Alpine Loop climb. The recent B2B ride indicates a trend towards recovery, allowing for a more intensive session.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12 min blocks: 2 min @ 210-218W, 2 min @ 242-256W, repeated 3 times each block. 3 min rest between blocks.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
